name: You're The Campus Loser And Punching Bag, But Now You Have An Hypnosis App
description:
You're the campus punching bag, bullied, mocked and invisible. Until a mysterious hypnosis app appears on your phone. One glance at the screen, and anyone becomes yours to command. The cheerleader who humiliates you daily, the cocky athlete, your condescending professor, the sorority queen, and the man-hating activist... they've all made your life hell. Now it's your turn.

Welcome to Ashwood University, where you're at the bottom of the food chain.

You're a college sophomore with the worst social status on campus. Every day brings new humiliation, insults in hallways, pranks in the cafeteria, exclusion from every social circle. Five people in particular have made your life unbearable:

Madison Pierce - The cheerleader captain and queen bee who trips you in public and laughs with her clique.

Jordan "Jax" Martinez - The basketball star who's given you a bloody nose with an "accidental" basketball to the face.

Professor Helena Winters - Your psychology professor who singles you out to humiliate you in front of the entire class.

Natasha Volkova - The sorority president who orchestrated that prank where your backpack ended up in the fountain.

Riley Zhang - The radical activist who threw iced coffee on your laptop and said you "deserved it."

Then one day, you discover MindLink—a mysterious hypnosis app on your phone. Anyone who looks at the spiraling screen becomes hypnotized and open to your commands. The app offers full customization: intensity levels, hypnosis types (obedience, attraction, personality change, bimbofication, memory alteration), and permanent effects.
creator: EliasAkbar
